attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
IAM_USER_KEY,
IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
rs2.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY,
ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
'1' as IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ACTION_CODE,
DML_TYPE,
'Y' ALL_NODES_ALLOWED_FLG 
FROM	 
	(
	SELECT	
	SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
	NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
	SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
	SIEURTH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
	SIEURTH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
	SIEURTH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
	CASE	 
		WHEN	 SIEURTH.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
	 
		WHEN	  SIEURTH.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' 
	END	  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
	SIEURTH.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	 'I'	ACTION_CODE,
	 'I'   DML_TYPE
	FROM	 
	$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_TMS_HIER SIEURTH 
	INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
		ON	 (SIEURTH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID 
		AND	 IAC.STATUS ='A')
	INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
		ON	 SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
	INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
		ON	 NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURTH.IAM_USER_ID 
	INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
		ON	 SIEURTH.TOOL_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
	WHERE	 SIEURTH.LVL_NUMBER = 0 
		AND	
	SIEURTH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE = 'EDW_TMSCORP'
) rs1
FULL JOIN 
(	
	SELECT  TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY, BK_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME
	FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_TV 
	WHERE BK_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME IN 
		(
		SELECT L1_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME
		FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_TECH_MKT_SEGMENT WHERE HIERARCHY_TYPE = 'TMS_CORPORATE'
		GROUP BY 1
		) 
	AND END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
	GROUP  BY 1, BK_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME
) rs2
ON 1=1
WHERE IAM_USER_KEY IS NOT NULL AND  (BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, IAM_USER_KEY, IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY)
NOT IN (SELECT BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME, IAM_USER_KEY, IAM_APPLICATION_KEY, TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY FROM $$WORKDB.W_IAM_TMS_CORP_HIER_LINK)

SELECT
SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME AS BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME,
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY AS IAM_USER_KEY,
SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY AS IAM_APPLICATION_KEY,
NTMSC.TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY AS TECHNOLOGY_MARKET_SEGMENT_KEY,
SIEURTH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE AS ASSIGNMENT_TYPE,
SIEURTH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG AS STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG,
SIEURTH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG AS EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG,
CASE WHEN SIEURTH.STATUS='A' THEN 'N'
 WHEN  SIEURTH.STATUS='I' THEN 'Y' END  SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
SIEURTH.LVL_NUMBER AS IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 'I'	ACTION_CODE,
 'I'   DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_TMS_HIER SIEURTH
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
ON (SIEURTH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_TV NTMSC			
ON SIEURTH.ERP_SEGMENT1 = NTMSC.BK_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURTH.IAM_USER_ID 
INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON SIEURTH.TOOL_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT
WHERE  SIEURTH.LVL_NUMBER>0 AND 
SIEURTH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE = 'EDW_TMSCORP'
AND NTMSC.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'

SELECT SIEURTH.IAM_USER_ID, SIEURTH.ROLE_ID, SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME, SIEURTH.TOOL_ID, SIEURTH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE, SIEURTH.LVL_NUMBER, SIEURTH.ERP_SEGMENT1, SIEURTH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE, SIEURTH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG, SIEURTH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG, SIEURTH.RESTRICTION_FLAG, SIEURTH.PROXY_FLAG, SIEURTH.GRANTOR_UNIVERSAL_ID, SIEURTH.GRANTOR_CEC_ID, SIEURTH.GRANTOR_CCO_ID, SIEURTH.STATUS, SIEURTH.TR_FLAG, SIEURTH.LAST_ACTION, SIEURTH.CREATED_BY, SIEURTH.CREATE_DATE, SIEURTH.UPDATED_BY, SIEURTH.UPDATE_DATE, SIEURTH.ACTION_CODE, SIEURTH.BATCH_ID, SIEURTH.CREATE_DATETIME ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_TMS_HIER SIEURTH

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
ON (SIEURTH.TOOL_ID =  IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS  = 'A')

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_TV NTMSC			
ON SIEURTH.ERP_SEGMENT1 = NTMSC.BK_TECHNOLOGY_MKT_SEGMENT_NAME

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME = NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURTH.IAM_USER_ID 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON SIEURTH.TOOL_ID = SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT

WHERE  SIEURTH.LVL_NUMBER>0 AND
SIEURTH.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE = 'EDW_TMSCORP'
AND NTMSC.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
AND (SIEURTH.TOOL_ID  IS NULL  OR
SIEURTH.ERP_SEGMENT1 IS NULL OR
SIEURTH.ROLE_NAME IS NULL OR
NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT IS NULL OR
SIEURTH.TOOL_ID IS NULL )
